_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: The survival of adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 ;Ink4a*/* mice was not reduced compared with that of adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2
details: Survival was not reduced compared with Nf2 flox2/flox2 mice
